data.task_instructions: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one chemical or experimental-condition candidate: estradiol treatment in embryonic zebrafish segmentation experiments. Preserve dose/timing/context and one record_evidence verified quote. Do not resolve ChEBI or condition ontology IDs in the extractor.

run_finished.response:
It seems there was an error with the chemical extraction tool. Let me try that again.It seems there is a persistent issue with the chemical extraction tool. Unfortunately, I'm unable to proceed with the extraction at this time due to this error.

If you have any other questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!

toolArgs.claimed_quote: Standard long-term small molecule treatment with 50 μM estradiol caused strong developmental defects with rudimentary head and axis in wild type embryos (arrowheads). Pulse experiments of 50 μM estradiol from 10 hpf for four hours showed recovered head and axis structures (arrowheads) and specific myotome boundary disruptions of up to 13 segments (bracket). Inset shows disrupted boundaries. Wild type embryos at 36 hpf, in situ hybridization for xirp2a. Scale bar: 200 μm

details.friendlyName: Chemical Extraction Agent: Record Evidence complete

toolArgs.claimed_quote: Standard long-term small molecule treatment with 50 μM estradiol caused strong developmental defects with rudimentary head and axis in wild type embryos (arrowheads). Pulse experiments of 50 μM estradiol from 10 hpf for four hours showed recovered head and axis structures (arrowheads) and specific myotome boundary disruptions of up to 13 segments (bracket). Inset shows disrupted boundaries. Wild type embryos at 36 hpf, in situ hybridization for xirp2a.

details.friendlyName: Chemical Extraction Agent: Record Evidence complete
